title: The Expansion
description: Explore Space In Minecraft! Now with Spacesuits!
body: ![A player flying through space in a spaceship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cf60b8eeed61a1e3889965b981b29d75d819ae4_0.webp) *Humanity has always dreamed of traversing the universe in search of unknown planets and moons. And now, this is to some extent possible in vanilla Minecraft!* The Expansion adds 7 space-related dimensions, more than 10 structures to find there, 3 vehicles, a lot of custom items, tools, weapons, machines... ... and a whole load of other features! ### Getting started - Look at The Moon at night with a spyglass while holding a book and quill in your offhand. ### Other Information - The datapack is multiplayer compatible. - The datapack doesn't work on Minecraft Realms because it utilizes the 'experimental' custom dimension features. - Do not remove The Expansion from your server once installed. Removing it *will* break your server. - Please report any bugs you may find to my discord server. ### Also download the REQUIRED RESOURCEPACK! ![Resourcepack Instructions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/439b9a9badf8541b9f6a8e8f94568ef72b0c592a.png) [](https://discord.gg/3evKFsHE4P) [](https://ko-fi.com/vonleipenstein)
